recommendations.what_to_take: Integrate the performance metrics (Sharpe ratio, drawdowns, win rate) and visualization functions for strategy reporting. Use quantstats.stats for backtesting analysis and quantstats.plot for generating standardized performance charts.
recommendations.risk: MIT license is safe. Minimal maintenance risk due to high community adoption (6.9k stars). No major complexity concerns as it's a pure Python library with clear API. ArbClaw's lean nature might make full integration overkill, but core metrics can be selectively used.

recommendations.what_to_take: Integrate vectorbt's vectorized backtesting engine and strategy implementation patterns for new strategy development (ArbClaw) and to enhance RivalClaw's self-tuning capabilities, avoiding full replacement of existing graduation engine.
recommendations.risk: MIT license is safe; primary risk is moderate integration complexity (refactoring existing backtesting logic) but manageable with incremental adoption.
